VAL-PREP-002.reason: Single-video intake auto-started preparation without manual POST /api/sessions/{sessionId}/prepare. After submitting the single-video link (https://www.douyin.com/video/7388888888888888888), the app redirected directly to /sessions/session_1ceb88b13a37ba0fe8929d85/preparation (skipping candidate review). The preparation page showed exactly 1 item ('Single Video Content - 73888888') with prepStatus 'ready', confirming auto-start through all lifecycle phases (pending → downloading → transcribing → ready). The GET /api/sessions/{sessionId} response confirmed inputType='single-video', workflowPhase='preparation', and the single item at prepStatus='ready' with artifacts populated.
